headline: How The Story Is Shifting For American Electric Power (AEP) As Analysts Rework Targets
summary: Analyst models for American Electric Power Company now point to a slightly higher fair value, with the price target shifting from US$137.47 to US$141.38. That change sits alongside generally constructive research, where several firms highlight earnings and rate base potential, a sizeable 56 GW contract backlog and an investment program focused on supply and transmission, even as others flag sector sentiment and policy risks. As you read on, you will see how these updates fit into the broader...
